channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly-post, 8th June
item.description:
Fly-post on lamppost 24K01 on Kemnal Road (close to junction with Bromley Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess across the pavement, 8th June
item.description:
Dog mess spreading across pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kinnaird Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and dumped rubbish from 15, 8th June
item.description:
Bins overflowing, green bin not emptied for months causing maggots and flies in the heat. Non household rubbish just dumped for refuse workers to collect

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bastion Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 8th June
item.description:
Water not running away into drain after a small amount of rain fall. Blocked drain in Glanfield Road side of 127 Eden Park Ave. Water is half way across the road and also over the dropped kerb. Please could a Gulley Sucker be sent out to clear the drain. This corner always floods when it rains. Asset ID: 730004167

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glanfield Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over hanging tree, 8th June
item.description:
This tree needs to be cut as elderly struggle to duck underneath it and it’s far to low, needs to be cut back as also dangerous for cyclists who skip out of there lane at this point. Health and safety issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on shop frontage, 8th June
item.description:
Graffiti on shop frontage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gipsy Hill, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Completely blocked drain, 8th June
item.description:
This is another drain that is totally blocked. Outside 29 Green Lane. This makes two in the same stretch of road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edward Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and plants blocking street drainage, 8th June
item.description:
Bike storage not swept, build up of litter and growing plants stopping street drainage.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Russell Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 8th June
item.description:
Graffiti on cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cawnpore Street, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Black bedside cabinet dumped on pavement, 8th June

Black bedside cabinet dumbed in Diameter Rd Petts Wood
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Diameter Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Dip in pavement, 8th June
item.description:
I have just had an accident from falling on the dipped pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Heversham Road, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of cardboard dumped in front of recyling bins. No access, 8th June
item.description:
Been building up for past week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Loddiges Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Matress Dumped and general rubbish, 8th June
item.description:
Usual dumping if rubbish under the tree at the corner of chandler way and Dalton close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbly paving stone near morrison's, 8th June
item.description:
Yet again there's a wobbly paving slab between Bagel king and morrison's. someone's going to have an accident
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-5, Walworth Place, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffit on bike store and door nearby, 8th June
item.description:
Please clean

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62-85, McNeil Road, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Car stopped on crossing, then on double red lines, 8th June
item.description:
Car stopped on the crossing, then stopped on double red lines

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Bishopsgate, City of London

item.title: Bollard damaged by vehicle, 8th June
item.description:
Bollard damaged by vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Comber Grove, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Black sacks of rubbish dumped Wallhouse Road/Burnett Road, 8th June
item.description:
There are a few black sacks of rubbish dumped in the drain area by the grass verge on Wallhouse Road junction of Burnett Road on right hand side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnett Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Standing water outside No. 34-38, 8th June
item.description:
The last few months I realised whenever it rains the water standstills on the pavement outside 34-38. Additionally the pavement is full of repair patches, It would be a great idea to resurface the pavement in full and sort all tree stumps.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near corner of Lulworth and Newlyn rod, 8th June
item.description:
Pot has been filled in 3 or 4 times with qick fix, a bucket of tarmac, lasts about 2 weeks and then repair fails. Hole needs deeper more permanent repair, this hazard is a risk to cyclists as fill with rainwater. Urgent permanent fixture needed, as constantly failing and re reported
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
